title: The Death of Yazid b. 'Abd al-Malik
description: In this year, the Caliph, Yazid b. `Abd al-Malik b. Marwan, died on the twenty-sixth of Sha'ban (January 28, 724) 658 This was related to me by Abmad b. Thibit-his authority-Ishaq b. 'Isi-Abu Ma'shar. Al-Wagidi transmitted the same report. According to al-Wagidi: He died in Balga ',659 which is in the district of Damascus, at the age of thirty-eight. Some authorities say that he died at the age of forty, while others maintain that he was thirty-six. According to Abu Ma`shar, Hisham b. Muhammad, and `Ali b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
